title: Did US use F-15E rescue op as cover to seize uranium? Iran claims ‘deception mission’
summary_full: Iran alleges a US rescue mission for a downed F-15E crew member may have been a cover to steal enriched uranium, a claim the US dismisses as a complex, intelligence-led extraction. The operation, described as daring, occurred deep inside Iranian territory amid escalating regional conflict.
